name: io.github.seob717/redash-mcp
description: Connect Redash to Claude -- query data, manage dashboards, and run SQL with natural language.

environmentVariables.name: REDASH_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Redash user API key (found in Settings > Account)

environmentVariables.name: REDASH_SAFETY_MODE
environmentVariables.description: SQL safety mode: 'strict' blocks risky queries, 'warn' (default) returns warnings, 'off' disables guards (not recommended).

environmentVariables.name: REDASH_SAFETY_DISABLE_PII
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to disable the PII column guard. Not recommended.

environmentVariables.name: REDASH_SAFETY_DISABLE_COST
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to disable the query cost guard. Not recommended.
